title: Menu Category Settings

fields.label: Menu Subtitle
fields.name: menu_subtitle
fields.instructions: Optional short text beside the category name, for example Non Alcoholic.

fields.label: Regular Price Override
fields.name: regular_price
fields.instructions: Optional. When empty, the price is derived from products in this category.

fields.label: Large Price Override
fields.name: large_price
fields.instructions: Optional. When empty, the price is derived from products in this category.

description: Optional category display settings for the Shop page menu blocks.
